2603.24533.title: UI-Voyager: A Self-Evolving GUI Agent Learning via Failed Experience
2603.24533.paper_summary: Autonomous mobile GUI agents have attracted increasing attention along with the advancement of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing methods still suffer from inefficient learning from failed trajectories and ambiguous credit assignment under sparse rewards for long-horizon GUI tasks. To that end, we propose UI-Voyager, a novel two-stage self-evolving mobile GUI agent. In the first stage, we employ Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT), which enables the continuous co-evolution of data and models in a fully autonomous loop. The second stage introduces Group Relative Self-Distillation (GRSD), which identifies critical fork points in group rollouts and constructs dense step-level supervision from successful trajectories to correct failed ones. Extensive experiments on AndroidWorld show that our 4B model achieves an 81.0% Pass@1 success rate, outperforming numerous recent baselines and exceeding human-level performance. Ablation and case studies further verify the effectiveness of GRSD. Our method represents a significant leap toward efficient, self-evolving, and high-performance mobile GUI automation without expensive manual data annotation.
2603.24533.paper_summary_zh: 自主移動 GUI 代理隨著多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 的進步而受到越來越多的關注。<lb/>然而，現有方法仍然面臨從失敗軌跡中學習效率低下以及在稀疏獎勵下對長期 GUI 任務的模糊信用分配問題。<lb/>為此，我們提出了 UI-Voyager，一種新穎的兩階段自我演化移動 GUI 代理。<lb/>在第一階段，我們採用了拒絕微調 (RFT)，這使得數據和模型在完全自主的循環中持續共同演化。<lb/>第二階段引入了群體相對自蒸餾 (GRSD)，它識別群體展開中的關鍵分叉點，並從成功的軌跡中構建密集的步驟級監督，以修正失敗的軌跡。<lb/>在 AndroidWorld 上的廣泛實驗顯示，我們的 4B 模型達到了 81.0% 的 Pass@1 成功率，超越了許多近期基準，並且超過了人類水平的表現。<lb/>消融和案例研究進一步驗證了 GRSD 的有效性。<lb/>我們的方法代表了朝著高效、自我演化和高性能的移動 GUI 自動化邁出了一大步，而不需要昂貴的手動數據標註。
2603.24533.author: Zichuan Lin et.al.
2603.24533.authors: Zichuan Lin, Feiyu Liu, Yijun Yang, Jiafei Lyu, Yiming Gao, Yicheng Liu, Zhicong Lu, Yangbin Yu, Mingyu Yang, Junyou Li, Deheng Ye, Jie Jiang
